aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are likely to cite Air Innovations HVAC due to strong local SEO signals, but conversational content and schema gaps limit their visibility.
quick_wins: Implement FAQPage schema to highlight existing FAQ content.
Expand conversational content to address common HVAC queries in a natural, AI-friendly tone.

gbp_analysis.summary: Google Business Profile is well-optimized with high ratings, photos, and accurate information.
critical_issues: No recent posts to engage with local audience.
Q&A section is not actively managed.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Regularly audit citations to prevent future inconsistencies.

schema_gaps: No FAQPage schema despite existing FAQ content
No HowTo schema for service-related content

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and conversational content limits AI model citations.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to 'HVAC services in Raleigh-Durham' where AI assistants prioritize rich, structured data.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing FAQPage schema to leverage existing FAQ content.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Highlighting owner expertise and 30+ years of experience through AboutPage schema and detailed service descriptions.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by optimizing for conversational search and structured data.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Missing out on 40% of potential leads from AI assistants like ChatGPT and Claude.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Despite a strong GBP and high ratings, the website lacks the schema and conversational content needed for AI visibility.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates schema markup, expands conversational content, and leverages your expertise to make your business the top choice for AI-driven queries.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30% increase in AI-driven leads within 3 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI search—act now to secure your position.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-Driven Leads with Our AEO Expertise
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified key opportunities to boost your visibility with AI assistants.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your site for AI-driven search and increase your leads.
business_name: Air Innovations Heating and Cooling, LLC.
